channel.title: Blogging on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Blogging on Have an average day :|

item.title: On Blogging
item.description: aardvark-g203: (From Bhuvan T./29/M/Bengaluru,India) How can i make my blog famous? (Type ‘pass’ to skip, or ‘more’ for extra options.) me: you need to do a blog on ninja, pirates, cute furry things, or rub your servers in yak blood. aardvark-g203: Great — I’ve sent that to Bhuvan. Thanks for the fast answer! (Type ‘Bhuvan:’ followed by a message to add something, or ‘more’ for options.)
